title: Odontadenia macrocalyx
taxonomy: Odontadenia macrocalyx is classified within the Apocynaceae family, a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as dogbanes or oleander family. This family comprises over 5,000 species, with Odontadenia being a genus of flowering plants native to tropical regions of Africa. The Apocynaceae family is further divided into several subfamilies, including the Asclepiadoideae, which is the subfamily to which Odontadenia macrocalyx belongs. Within the Asclepiadoideae subfamily, Odontadenia macrocalyx is part of the Periplocoideae tribe. Odontadenia macrocalyx is a species of evergreen climber, found in the tropical forests of West Africa.
